ddls:
CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment (e.g., fertilizer, pesticide, irrigation) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the treatment was first applied */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the treatment was last applied */,
  "application_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of application (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  "application_instructions" TEXT /* Detailed instructions for applying the treatment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who designed the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application method */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the treatment using this application method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the boron application method */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of boron applied (lbs∙ac-1) */,
  "number_of_applications" INTEGER /* Number of applications */,
  "application_cost" REAL /* Cost of the application method */,
  "application_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the application process */,
  "application_equipment" TEXT /* Equipment used for the application */,
  "environmental_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the application on the environment */,
  "application_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plants" (
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant observation */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the treatment applied */,
  "plant_stand" REAL /* Percentage of plant stand */,
  "stems_per_plant" REAL /* Number of stems per plant */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the plant */,
  "variety" TEXT /* Variety of the plant */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil the plant is growing in */,
  "watering_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of watering */,
  "fertilizer_used" TEXT /* Type of fertilizer used */,
  "plant_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the plant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plants_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the experiment was conducted */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the experiment */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  "experimental_design" TEXT /* Design of the experiment (e.g., randomized block, split-plot) */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the experiment */,
  "experiment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_treatments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the treatment applied in the experiment */,
  "application_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule of treatments applied in the experiment */,
  "treatment_effectiveness" TEXT /* Measured effectiveness of the treatment */,
  "treatment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the treatment in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, agronomist, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access (e.g., 1 hour, 1 day) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the access */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boron_applications" (
  "application_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boron application record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application method */,
  "date_applied" TEXT /* Date the boron was applied */,
  "quantity_applied" REAL /* Quantity of boron applied */,
  "application_depth" TEXT /* Depth at which the boron was applied */,
  "application_method_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the application method */,
  "application_weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boron_applications_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boron_applications_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant measurement */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the plant observation */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date the measurement was taken */,
  "plant_stand" REAL /* Percentage of plant stand */,
  "stems_per_plant" REAL /* Number of stems per plant */,
  "plant_height" REAL /* Height of the plant */,
  "leaf_count" INTEGER /* Number of leaves per plant */,
  "root_length" REAL /* Length of the roots */,
  "measurement_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_measurements_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "average_plant_stand" REAL /* Average plant stand percentage */,
  "average_stems_per_plant" REAL /* Average number of stems per plant */,
  "yield_per_acre" REAL /* Yield of the crop per acre */,
  "economic_value" REAL /* Economic value of the yield */,
  "environmental_sustainability" TEXT /* Assessment of the environmental sustainability of the results */,
  "result_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
